description.s: Imports an Obsidian vault into Hobson. Uses Tauri filesystem access to read the vault, converts markdown to Active Text, resolves wikilinks to item references, imports images as image items.

const imp = await api.require("obsidian-import");
await imp.importVault(api);

importVault.name: importVault
importVault.description: Import an Obsidian vault into Hobson.

params.name: opts
params.description: .path] - Vault path (opens folder picker if omitted)
